events.name: dust_storm
events.description: Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

narrative:
## Year 24

### Events
- [RED] **dust_storm**: Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.

**Activity:** farm(2), code(2), cooperate(2), pray(1), sabotage(1)
**Resources:** food:100%[OK] | water:100%[OK] | power:100%[OK] | air:100%[OK] | medicine:100%[OK]
**Cohesion:** 76%

### Sub-simulations (8)

*META: Iron Mar notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.*

diaries.text:
**Fen Marsh** (water/healer) — Year 24

Another year. We are still here.

The dust never stops.

*— Fen Marsh, healer*

**Rust Vega** (earth/engineer) — Year 24

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

The dust never stops.

*— Rust Vega, engineer*

**Grove Ash** (earth/farmer) — Year 24

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

The dust never stops.

*— Grove Ash, farmer*
